entry.title: ‘Till your blood goes blue
entry.summary:
Author: sole_braincell

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,782Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 39

Summary: Tim is de-aged and forced to have a mission in Damian’s school to fix it. Only to find a world unknown to the Waynes.  Damian’s civllian high-school life, apparently, is nothing he or any of the Wayne’s had ever imagined. And how exactly does romancing Tim Drake factor in all this? Well, it just happens. Blame the amazing teenage brain and hormones. For sure, Tim is blaming his fate of being in the perpetual state of puberty, and Damian's skipping his own.

entry.title: Pet Diary
entry.summary:
Author: CallmeSSS

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,949Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 77

Summary: Gotham has a crime rate that rivals its population count, police sirens are familiar background noise, and people learn not to ask too many questions.Dick Grayson and Tim Drake don't ask too many questions either.About the gray rabbit who sulks over bread.About the black cat who looks at them like he's plotting something.About why things in the apartment sometimes move on their own.They just think they're keeping pets.They're not entirely wrong.

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,641Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 94

entry.title: Sharing is Caring
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,370Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 65

Summary: "Go ahead and ask your questions now, Tim," Father invites. "What are we doing, B?" "If you're both comfortable, I still owe it to you to make up for how I treated you on Damian's birthday." "Okay… And how…?" Father's hands ghost up and down Damian's body, slow and soft. It feels nice, and his eyelids flutter. "I thought we could share." Another flood of arousal drips around him at the thought. "Would you like that, Tim?" "Yeah," he breathes, eyes going wide. Father chuckles. "And based on the way your brother just squeezed down on me when I said that, I think he might like the idea, too."

entry.title: Everything Falls Down
entry.summary:
Author: noctstate

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,974Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 18

Summary: He can allow himself to simply exist here, in the rumble of thunder that vibrates through his bones; the cracks of lightning that smell like ozone and illuminate a dark, cloudy sky; the gusts of wind that throw rain directly into his face, forcing his body to bow against the stinging assault until there’s a lull. It’s during one of those moments, when his eyes are closed, and his hood is up, that the rain stops altogether. The noise, however, does not. It is very much still raining. Damian squints up, face damp and hair plastered to his forehead, to see Red Robin standing above him. His cape held above the both of them as a makeshift shelter.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: In Wolf's Clothing
entry.summary:
Author: Yukhta

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,380Chapters: 4/15Kudos: 14

Summary: The beast looked him straight in the eyes, as if seeing straight through everything Damian had so carefully concealed — and he knew at once: this wasn’t a beast; a werewolf, perhaps. Or maybe a clueless young mage or a stray wild spirit. In any case, it was someone who could sense the pulse of magic on instinct. Damian had long since smothered his own. The wolf wouldn’t look away. For some reason, the snap of the trap felt like a handshake.   or   Damian finds a werewolf caught in a trap in the woods. And so his life as a recluse comes to an end.

entry.title: The Shared Lust Of Being A Robin
entry.summary:
Author: nursal1060

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,239Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 40

Summary: Bruce has been missing for several weeks. Everyone is on edge - Damian knows it, as he’s stepped up in Bruce’s absence. He decides to help relieve the stress of his past Robins.Dick learns how good it feels to be “taken care of” by their oldest brother - and Tim and Jason show him the ropes. entry.title: The final piece of the puzzle
entry.summary:
Author: Reihateangst
